notes: Entry point is CNA. LPN is an optional intermediate step. RN is the core career. Advanced practice branches at RN level.
Entry is patrol officer after academy. Detective and supervisor are parallel advancement tracks. Private investigation is a lateral exit.
Direct public entry via transit agency academy. Not a promotion from municipal patrol. Own ladder within transit/railroad agencies.

Entry is airfield ops (ground-side safety and compliance). ATC and aviation inspector are parallel advancement paths. Military ATC (AFSC 1C7X1 / Army 15Q) is a major feeder into both the airfield ops and ATC civilian roles but has no O*NET code.
Entry is junior programming/coding. Web Developer is the core role. Branches into design (UX/UI)
column15: and management. Software Developer is the canonical senior advancement. Computer Programmer entry wage sourced from BLS.

notes: Multiple entry points: retail/general sales (low barrier) and specialized sales (insurance). Core B2B path leads to wholesale sales reps then management. Real estate is a parallel specialization track. Sales Engineers are a high-resilience lateral entry for those with technical domain expertise.

Entry via budget analysis (government/corporate). Core mid-level is management consulting. Branches into financial analysis and compliance/regulatory roles. Financial Examiners (13-2061) are the highest-resilience senior destination.
Multiple entry points: bookkeeping clerks (no degree
column11: lowest barrier) and tax preparers (certificate/license). Core path leads to accountant/auditor. Branches into lending
column14: and examiner roles. Financial Managers are the leadership destination at $162k.

entry_occupation: Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists
notes: Entry via market research (data-driven). Core path leads to digital/search marketing then brand or marketing management. PR and content/editorial are parallel specialization tracks. Ad sales agents (sales cluster) can cross over via search marketing. Marketing Managers ($161k) are the leadership destination.
